name: Unusual Parent for a System Process
notes: This rule triggers when an unusual parent is found for a system process.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create
when the event matches Process Name IMATCHES '((smss)|(wininit)|(taskhost)|(lsass)|(winlogon)|(explorer)|(lsm)|(svchost)|(services)|(csrss))\.exe' AQL filter query
when the event matches REFERENCEMAPSETCONTAINS('ProcessMaptoProcessParentPath', LOWER("Process Name"), LOWER("Parent Process Path")) != True AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Unusual Parent for a System Process on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create
AND when the event matches Process Name IMATCHES '((smss)|(wininit)|(taskhost)|(lsass)|(winlogon)|(explorer)|(lsm)|(svchost)|(services)|(csrss))\.exe' AQL filter query
AND when the event matches REFERENCEMAPSETCONTAINS('ProcessMaptoProcessParentPath', LOWER("Process Name"), LOWER("Parent Process Path")) != True AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Abnormal Parent for a System Process
Event description: Abnormal Parent for a System Process
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
